name: Allied Cash Advance
description_short: Tucson, AZ location of Allied Cash Advance at 6330 E Golf Links Rd Suite 192 offers fast payday and title loans Monday-Saturday.
description_long:
Allied Cash Advance's Tucson location sits at 6330 E Golf Links Rd Suite 192, a standalone storefront in the northeast area of town. The store operates Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, with Saturday hours from 10 AM to 2 PM, and is closed on Sundays. This location in Tucson, AZ provides convenient access to financial services for residents in the Golf Links corridor.

At this Tucson storefront, you can apply for payday loans and title loans with minimal documentation. Staff can guide you through the application process over the phone at +1 520-745-5771, or visit in person during business hours. Whether you need fast cash for an emergency or a short-term loan against your vehicle's title, this E Golf Links location serves Tucson area borrowers with same-day funding options.

When you visit, bring a valid ID, proof of income, and banking information to speed up your application. Allied Cash Advance offers quick approval and same-day funding for qualified applicants, making it a practical option for urgent financial needs in Tucson, AZ.
address: 6330 E Golf Links Rd Suite 192, Tucson, AZ 85730

company_info.headquarters: 6330 E Golf Links Rd Suite 192, Tucson, AZ 85730

pros: Same-day or next-day funding available (30 minutes with debit card, next business day online, same-day in-store)
Multiple application channels: online, in-store, and phone (where available)
Extended retail hours: weekdays 10am-6pm, Saturday 10am-2pm at Mesa location
High customer satisfaction: 4.9-star rating across 379 Google reviews with consistent praise for staff professionalism
Flexible credit consideration: states credit is a factor but does not automatically deny bad/no credit applicants
Simple application requirements: only proof of income, ID, checking account, and phone number needed
Installment loan option allows repayment over time on fixed schedule rather than lump-sum payday loan structure
cons: APR rates and fee structures not disclosed on website, preventing cost transparency and comparison shopping
No guidance provided on credit score impact, limiting ability for consumers to make informed decisions
Vehicle proof of ownership requirement in Arizona only—unclear policy for other states served
High-cost lending sector suggests rates likely exceed 36% APR threshold, typical of payday/installment lenders
Website shows maintenance message, indicating potential service disruptions or outdated information
best_for: Consumers needing cash within 24 hours who have active checking accounts and proof of income
Arizona residents seeking in-person loan services with extended hours and immediate decision-making
Borrowers with poor or no credit history open to installment loan repayment structures
diagnosis: Allied Cash Advance is best for consumers in Arizona and other served states who need emergency cash within 24 hours and have verifiable income and an active checking account. The primary caveat is the complete lack of rate and fee transparency on their website—consumers must visit a location or call to understand the actual cost of borrowing, which is essential information before applying.
services: Installment loans (unsecured personal loans with fixed repayment schedules)
Retail remote refinancing and reloans for existing customers
In-store customer service and loan counseling
Same-day funding option at physical locations
meta_description: Allied Cash Advance at 6330 E Golf Links Rd, Tucson, AZ. Fast payday and title loans with same-day funding available.
